Notice And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT & FINANCE INC. Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings. Appearances: Linda Chan, Esq. Attorney at Law, (310) 370-3730 specially appearing for Plaintiff and moving party; Feona Santos, Defendant in Pro Per appearing. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff to obtain judgment forthwith. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and judgment.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
